MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2025 Vacated

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2025 Continued To Jun-04-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-10-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT JOHN HAMBLETT's Motion To Quash Service; Request For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

1. Although the motion is unopposed, Court records reflect the defendant was served Oct. 27, 2024. POS reflects the person being served acknowledged he was the person named in the papers being served.

2. POS of service also reflects "The individual tried to refuse service by dropping documents and did not state reason for refusal.

3. Motion to quash/denied.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Barbara A. Zuniga; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/BAZ)

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Text Ruling

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Continued To May-13-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
